scripts.agents:reset: docker compose -f infrastructure/docker/compose.yaml down --volumes && docker compose -f infrastructure/docker/compose.yaml up -d --build
scripts.antigravity:down: docker compose -f infrastructure/docker/compose.yaml stop antigravity && docker compose -f infrastructure/docker/compose.yaml rm -f antigravity
scripts.antigravity:reset: docker compose -f infrastructure/docker/compose.yaml stop antigravity && docker compose -f infrastructure/docker/compose.yaml rm -f antigravity && docker compose -f infrastructure/docker/compose.yaml up -d --build antigravity
scripts.copilot:down: docker compose -f infrastructure/docker/compose.yaml stop copilot && docker compose -f infrastructure/docker/compose.yaml rm -f copilot
scripts.copilot:reset: docker compose -f infrastructure/docker/compose.yaml stop copilot && docker compose -f infrastructure/docker/compose.yaml rm -f copilot && docker compose -f infrastructure/docker/compose.yaml up -d --build copilot
